failure_modes.text: Peer review fails when the room rewards agreement and reassurance more than independent challenge.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger When Feedback Becomes Social Comfort
failure_modes.mitigation: Structure review for genuine adversarial challenge: require reviewers to state the strongest argument against the proposal before offering support.

failure_modes.text: Status and consensus pressure can make outside review ceremonial instead of genuinely adversarial.
failure_modes.source_quote: The Wisdom of Crowds fails when people are not making independent judgments
failure_modes.mitigation: Anonymize or randomize reviewer input to reduce status effects: collect critiques in writing before group discussion so seniority cannot filter the challenge.

failure_modes.text: Perspective collection becomes wasteful when critique stays vague instead of testing the assumptions that would change the answer.
failure_modes.source_quote: the key is not more opinions but better challenge
failure_modes.mitigation: Require specific, assumption-level critique: reject vague 'looks good' or 'needs work' feedback and insist reviewers name the exact assumption they would change and why.

premortem_questions.text: What might be wrong with our current view?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What might I be wrong about?

premortem_questions.text: What assumption fails first if our conclusion is weaker than we think?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What assumptions is this conclusion resting on?

premortem_questions.text: Who would disagree for substantive reasons, and what would they say before we hear our own explanation again?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Seek out perspectives that genuinely differ from your own

heuristics.text: Ask for independent critique before exposing reviewers to the dominant story so the challenge is not anchored to the current framing.
heuristics.source_quote: people must make independent judgments to benefit from collective intelligence

heuristics.text: Use adversarial review to test the argument before reality does.
Favor the feedback that changes assumptions or exposes blind spots over the feedback that merely affirms tone or polish.
heuristics.source_quote: The value is in surfacing blind spots, not collecting praise

curation_notes.summary: The source is naturally chunk-ready on independent challenge, anti-consensus drift, and perspective stress-testing before commitment.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor collaboration sprawl because the raw source is stronger on independent critique and anti-reassurance discipline.
open_questions: The first premortem item is normalized from repeated self-challenge framing rather than preserved as a single verbatim source line.

allies: The raw ally surface is strongest on systems-thinking, feedback-loops, opportunity-cost, and incentives as later relation material.
antagonists: The raw antagonist pressure is strongest on confirmation-bias, authority-following, and group drift, but only the cleanest current-vocabulary ids should survive Wave 3.
structured_tensions: The source is contestable around consensus and status pressure, but it does not expose a compact explicit current-vocabulary tension block as cleanly as stronger Wave 3 files do.
